data.text: make me a leetcode like app where you can post problems and others can give the solution code and you can run them

Built a static `StackRank` frontend in [index.html](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-leetcode-like-app-wher-5f74/index.html), [app.js](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-leetcode-like-app-wher-5f74/app.js), and [styles.css](/home/navid/java/app-builder/agent-backend/workspaces/make-me-a-leetcode-like-app-wher-5f74/styles.css). It wires auth via `/auth/login` and `/auth/register`, problem creation via `POST /posts`, feed/detail reads via `/bff/feed` and `/bff/posts/{id}`, solution submissions via `POST /comments/targets/post/{id}`, and search via `GET /post-search?q=...`, with a visible disabled “Being developed — backend not available yet” card for code execution because no runner backend exists.

`./verify-backend.sh` partially passed: the generated frontend contract lint passed, but the live-stack check failed at the first curl preflight with `curl: (7) failed to open socket: Operation not permitted`, so I could not verify the gateway-backed flows from this sandbox.
